hero.subtitle: The Good People is Pretoria's destination for professional barbering. Sharp fades, signature cuts, and grooming that's done right — every time.

services.label: What We Offer
services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Professional barber services designed to keep you looking sharp.

items.title: Skin Fade
items.description: Precision fade cuts that blend seamlessly from skin to longer hair. Clean, sharp lines every time.

items.title: Signature Cut
items.description: Our signature haircut tailored to your style and face shape using traditional scissor work and technique.

items.title: Beard Trim & Shape
items.description: Expert beard grooming with precise shaping and edging to keep your facial hair looking its best.

items.title: Hot Towel Shave
items.description: A classic barber experience — hot towel shave with finishing products for smooth, comfortable skin.

items.title: Grooming Package
items.description: Complete grooming treatment combining haircut, beard trim, and hot towel shave at a great value.

items.title: Line-up & Finish
items.description: Quick touch-ups and edge work to keep your cut sharp between full appointments.

about.label: About Us
about.title: The Good People Story
paragraphs: The Good People is Lynnwood Ridge's premier barber shop, built on the foundation of quality craftsmanship and genuine hospitality. Our barbers are trained professionals who take pride in every cut.

We believe in the timeless tradition of professional barbering — where attention to detail, client relationships, and good service are never compromised. Whether you're a regular or visiting us for the first time, you'll feel right at home.

gallery.label: Our Work
gallery.title: See Our Cuts
gallery.subtitle: Browse examples of our barber work and styling from clients across Pretoria East.

testimonials.label: Happy Clients
testimonials.title: What People Say
testimonials.subtitle: Real feedback from real clients in Pretoria.

items.quote: Always a pleasure to see my favourite barber in town. Quality service as usual — professionals at this business. Great haircuts, every single time.
The fade is perfect — sharp lines, clean work. These guys know what they're doing. Highly recommend The Good People for anyone wanting a quality cut.
Excellent service and great atmosphere. The barbers are friendly and take their time to get your cut right. Best barber shop in Lynnwood Ridge.
